items.title: Balogun reprieve ends in anti-climax as Belgium dump USA out
items.summary: Folarin Balogun's red card reprieve appeared to hinder rather than help his country as an out-of-sorts USA side were thrashed 4-1 by Belgium to end the co-hosts' World Cup dreams.

items.title: Belgium make light work of US to set up quarter-final tie with Spain
items.summary: Belgium ease past a defensively sloppy USA in a match shrouded in controversy surrounding Folarin Balogun's delayed suspension, a scandal that made little impact on the pitch.
